Atomic Punch.Effect: Atomic Punch Paralyzes the target on 18+. This Move is affected by Iron Fist.

Drain Life.Effect: After the target takes damage, the user gains HP equal to half of the damage they dealt to the target. This Move is affected by Strong Jaw.

Expunge.Effect: When calculating Weakness and Resistance for Expunge, Nuclear-Typed targets calculate damage as if Nuclear was weak to Nuclear; if the user has the Radioactive Ability, it treats the target at though the target was not Nuclear-Typed for the purposes of Radioactive. If the target is in Nuclear Fallout Weather, Expunge cannot miss.

Fallout.Effect: The weather becomes Nuclear Fallout for 3 rounds. While in Nuclear Fallout, all non-Nuclear or Steel Type Pokémon lose a Tick of Hit Points at the beginning of their turn.

Fission Burst.Effect: The user’s Hit Points are set to -50% of their full Hit Point value. This Hit Point loss may not be prevented or reduced in any way. The user’s loyalty toward its trainer may be lowered. This Move may be prevented by Damp.

Get Lucky.Effect: The user becomes Pumped. While Pumped, the user’s Critical Range is extended by 2, or 18+ if the Critical Range is not otherwise extended. Being switched will cause this effect to end.

Golden Fist.Effect: Golden Fist scatters metal coins equal in value to 1d8 times the user’s level. If it is a trainer battle, the winner of the battle gets to pick up the coins. This Move is affected by Iron Fist.

Half-Life.Effect: The target loses 1/2 of their current Hit Points.

Infernal Blade.Effect: Infernal Blade Burns legal targets on a 19+. When calculating Weakness and Resistance for Infernal Blade, Fairy-Typed targets calculate damage as if Fairy was weak to Fire.

Laser Pulse.Effect: After targeting Laser Pulse, roll 1d3. On a 1, this attack is Fire-Type; on a 2, it is Ice-Type; on a 3, it is Electric-Type. This Move benefits from Mega Launcher.

Metal Cruncher.Effect: Metal Cruncher lowers the target’s Defense 1 Combat Stage on a 7+.

Metal Whip.Effect: The target is put in a Vortex.

Nuclear Slash.Effect: Nuclear Slash is a Critical Hit on 18+.

Proton Beam.Effect: Lower the user’s Special Attack 2 Combat Stages after damage.

Quantum Leap.Set-Up Effect: The user is removed from the field, and their turn ends.
Quantum Leap.Resolution Effect: Quantum Leap’s user appears adjacent to any legal target on the field, ignoring Movement Capabilities, and then uses Quantum Leap’s attack. Quantum Leap cannot be avoided by Moves with the Shield Keyword, the Dodge Ability, or similar effects, and Intercepts may not be attempted in response.

Sky Fall.Effect: Sky Fall Paralyzes the target on 15+.

Sticky Terrain.Effect: The Field becomes Sticky for five rounds.  While the Field is Sticky, non-Flying and non- Levitating Pokémon cannot declare Priority or  Interrupt Moves outside their own Initiatives. In addition, all Jumping Capabilities of creatures touching the ground are reduced by 2, to a minimum of 0.

Subduction.Effect: The target’s Speed is lowered 2 Combat Stages, and the user becomes Confused after Damage.

Thunderstorm.Effect: The weather becomes a Thunderstorm for 5 rounds. While in a Thunderstorm, all non-Electric or Ground Type Pokémon lose a Tick of Hit Points at the beginning of their turn. Thunder never misses in a Thunderstorm.
